'''Loopy "The Lip" Leverby''' was a notorious criminal during the [[Mandalorian Wars]] and an associate of [[Marn Hierogryph]]. He operated the [[Leverby smuggling ring]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 2007-11-07 -->''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic Handbook]]'' {{1stm}}
